limitations: No quantified dollar amounts tied specifically to AI investment were found in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 (named but unquantified).

AI use cases are named (generative AI for services, employee training, data center load growth support) but no deployment metrics or quantified business results are disclosed; concreteness capped at 3.
The 10-year capital plan is referenced in connection with data center/AI demand growth but no AI-attributable dollar figure is broken out in the excerpts.
AI narrative language includes both 'using' and 'exploring', mixing deployed and aspirational framing without operational detail.
